title: Fixed formatting and lowered verbosity of pod ps
body:
CtrInfo now is formatted in the way originally intended. s/Number Of Containers/# Of Containers and s/Infra Container ID/Infra ID
Signed-off-by: haircommander <pehunt@redhat.com>

comments.body: Going to wait for tests to go green and merge
